case_title: SUSAN JULIUS VS. JESSE PASQUALE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1915 GREEN STREET, #103, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94123, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $52.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN
ORDER THAT SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT BE MADE BY POST AND MAIL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN SERVED AUG-07-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE
DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN RENTAL AGREEMENT BY JOSEPH A. SACRAMENTO, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIUS, SUSAN SERVED AUG-07-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PASQUALE, JESSE
